stemHtml: Which of the following statements about the GBAS is true?

options.a: Ground stations transmit corrections to satellites which then adjust their position data.
options.b: GBAS consists of at least three geostationary satellites and a network of ground stations .
options.c: Satellites calculate corrections and transmit directly to aircraft within range.
options.d: Ground stations whose positions are known are compared against calculated positions from the satellites.
